esqlQuery.esql:
TS metrics-cockroachdb.otel-default*
| WHERE service.name == "cockroachdb"
  AND txnwaitqueue_deadlocks_total IS NOT NULL
| WHERE attributes.node_id IS NOT NULL AND attributes.store IS NULL
// INCREASE for counter: any increase indicates deadlocks detected
| STATS deadlocks = SUM(INCREASE(txnwaitqueue_deadlocks_total)) BY attributes.node_id, host.name
| WHERE deadlocks > 0
| SORT deadlocks DESC
